LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ROBERT HINISH'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED TO ADD CLAIM OF NUISANCE AND TO DELETE CLAIM FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. THE NUISANCE CLAIM IS BASED ON THE SAME FACTS AT ISSUE AND WILL NOT PREJUDICE DEFENDANT. DENY TO ADD CONTRACTOR WITHOUT PREJUDICE. TO ADD A NEW PARTY, AT THIS LATE DATE, WOULD BE PREJUDICIAL. MR. LEADER-PICONE IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/20/07 IS CONTINUED TO 2/4/08 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
